trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no staff notes or delivery confirmations. Order Status is marked Complete, but Total Paid is $0.00 and Total Due is $209.40. There is no shipment or delivery record visible. Order date is Jan 16, 2023.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Comments History tab (empty), Order Totals panel (Total Paid $0.00, Total Due $209.40), Order & Account Information section on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/96#comments_history.
WHY IT MATTERS: A refund cannot be processed without evidence of payment and delivery status. The absence of comments/notes and the fact that no payment was captured conflict with the order being marked Complete and the customer’s claim of non-delivery. This requires escalation to finance/logistics to verify payment capture and shipment before approving or denying the refund.
